title: THE 2PM CLUB™ NORTHAMPTON - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
location: cinch Stadium at Franklin's Gardens, Northampton
description: Northampton, your afternoon rave is calling. The 2PM Club transforms daytime into pure celebration, with four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s hits that guarantee every chorus is louder than the last. From Spice Girls singalongs to Bon Jovi finale moments, it's a party that doesn't compromise on atmosphere just because the sun's up. Bring your crew, belt every lyric, and feel the floor shake with confetti-soaked nostalgia. And when it's over? You'll still be home in daylight — buzzing, smiling, and already planning the next one.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Bedford
description: Bedford families, this is your Halloween sorted. Fancy dress? Check. Glowing headphones? Triple check. Family Silent Disco is the one event where kids, teens and parents all get exactly the music they want, together on the same dance floor. Little ones bounce to Disney bangers, older kids vibe to chart hits, and parents rediscover the anthems they grew up with. Expect two hours of laughter, silly moves, glowing photos, and the relief of finally finding a family activity where no one compromises. Pure Halloween joy for all.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Northampton
description: Northampton goes spooky with Family Silent Disco's Halloween edition. Three channels keep everyone happy: Disney favourites for the little ones, chart hits for the teens, and throwback classics for parents. Add costumes, glowing headphones, and a buzzing dance floor, and you've got the ultimate two-hour family party. It's silly, joyful, and brilliantly inclusive — no arguments over music, no sulking in the corner. Just everyone, together, dancing like mad and laughing louder than ever. A Halloween memory you'll treasure more than any sweet stash.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Milton Keynes
description: Family Halloween silent disco at MK11 with multi-channel headphones. Fancy-dress welcome; daytime hours and child-friendly volumes.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ BEDFORD - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Bedford, your afternoon revolution starts here. The 2PM Club brings four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s anthems to Bedford Esquires with full club production — confetti cannons, inflatable mic moments, and every iconic tune you still know by heart. From Whitney's soaring choruses to Oasis singalongs, it's daytime disco done properly. No midnight queues, no 2 AM regrets, just pure nostalgic joy when the timing actually works. Dance hard, sing louder, and feel smug when you're home buzzing by 7.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Luton
description: Luton families, here's the solution to the eternal "what shall we do?" problem. Family Silent Disco brings kids, teens, and parents together with three channels of music — Party hits on Blue, chart toppers on Green, and nostalgic throwbacks on Red. It's two hours of proper connection, where everyone's dancing, laughing, and actually enjoying the same event without compromise. Add glowing headphones, silly moves, and plenty of selfies, and you've got an afternoon out that beats screens hands-down. A family day out that genuinely works.

title: CHRISTMAS SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON
description: Northampton's most festive tradition is back for its tenth year. The Christmas Silent Disco takes over The Picturedrome with three channels of joy: Wham! and Mariah on Blue, indie anthems on Red, and dance bangers on Green. Add glowing headphones, confetti, and a crowd that knows every word, and you've got a party that's more fun than any office do. Expect hilarious headphone-off moments, mass singalongs, and the smug walk home knowing you just nailed Christmas the Boombastic way.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ Northampton - Christmas Daytime Disco
description: Your Christmas daytime rave is here. Northampton's 2PM Club packs four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s classics into one festive-soaked afternoon. Think Whitney confetti moments, Robbie singalongs, and everyone in sequins or Santa hats, losing themselves in the music before dinner time. It's the no-hangover Christmas party: maximum fun, minimum faff. When Bon Jovi or Mariah hits and the whole room erupts, you'll know why this is the festive tradition that actually works.

title: Boombastic's Christmas Decades Party NORTHAMPTON
description: The Christmas party to end them all. Three decades. One dance floor. Zero shame. Northampton's ultimate festive knees-up blends the best of the 80s, 90s and 00s into one glitter-covered night. From Spice Girls to Oasis, Britney to Bon Jovi, every anthem gets its moment. Expect big choruses, sequins everywhere, and confetti raining down as the year wraps up in style. Forget boring work dos — this is where you'll actually want to be, belting every lyric until your throat gives out.

title: Christmas FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton
description: Jumpers on, headphones glowing, Christmas tunes blasting — Northampton's Family Silent Disco is back with a festive twist. Kids get their Disney joy on Blue, teens vibe with chart hits on Green, and parents relive throwback anthems on Red. All on the same floor, all at the same time, all buzzing with festive energy.
